channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 50 Prime Day deals under AU$50 — because you don't need to spend a lot of money on good tech
item.description: Amazon's Prime Day sales have officially kicked off, and we've found plenty of wallet-friendly tech that won't break the bank.

item.title: The Ninja DoubleStack at a record-low price of AU$189.95 is my pick of the best Prime Day air fryer deal — but there's more where that came from
item.description: With record-low prices on some of the best air fryers money can buy, now is a good time to grab a scrumptious discount, with prices from just AU$93.

item.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
item.description: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's headlines suggested.

item.title: Deuxième trimestre | Samsung estime à plus de 1800 % la hausse sur un an de son bénéfice d’exploitation
item.description: Le bénéfice d’exploitation du géant sud-coréen Samsung Electronics a bondi de 1810,3 % sur un an au deuxième trimestre 2026, porté par le boom mondial de la demande de semi-conducteurs pour l’intelligence artificielle (IA), selon des résultats préliminaires publiés mardi.

item.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
item.description: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, July 7 (game #1625)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, July 7 (game #1122)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, July 7 (game #856)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: This MacBook Pro packs premium features for under $400
item.description: Bring home your own Apple MacBook Pro for only $394.97

item.title: Smash those PBs for less — these 11+ Prime Day Garmin deals take up to 57% off Fenix, Forerunner, Venu and more
item.description: Amazon Prime Day is here and the retailer has discounted a wide range of Garmin products, including record-low prices on top-rated wearables and dashcams.
